title: Engineer's Decor
description: Adds cosmetic blocks for the engineer's workshop, factory and home.
body:
The mod has its focus decorative blocks and devices helping you to build nice looking manufacturing contraptions. 
Mainly intended to be used along with Immersive Engineering.

![](https://github.com/stfwi/engineers-decor/raw/master/documentation/engineers-decor-v113-brief.png)
